changeLog: Image input for AI vision workflows: paste clipboard images, drag PNG/JPG/GIF/WebP files onto the chat window, or attach files from the picker. Adds pending/image-history thumbnails, 5 MB image validation, model vision warnings, friendlier image API error hints, and new base64.lua/image.lua support modules. chat.lua now carries optional attachments and provider.lua translates image blocks for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
